builds_on.name: retrieval-augmented language models
builds_on.evidence: “We introduce REPLUG, a retrieval-augmented language modeling framework”

builds_on.name: black-box language models
builds_on.evidence: “REPLUG treats the language model as a black box”

builds_on.evidence: “augments it with a tuneable retrieval model”

builds_on.name: REPLUG LSR
builds_on.evidence: “We also introduce REPLUG LSR (REPLUG with LM-Supervised Retrieval)”
